scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) { try { fs.rmSync(f,{force:true}); } catch {} } const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; const execPath=(process.env.npm_execpath||'').toLowerCase(); const isPnpm=ua.startsWith('pnpm/')||execPath.includes('pnpm'); if(!isPnpm){ console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.dev:api: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run start
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
